Well played Côte d'Ivoire! 🇨🇮⚽ Congratulations on a hard-fought 1-0 victory over Ecuador in your opening FIFA World Cup 2026 match. Both teams showed great determination and created several chances throughout the game, making it an exciting contest for the fans.

A special salute to Amad for making an instant impact off the bench and scoring the decisive goal that secured a historic win for the Elephants, ending a 12-year wait for a World Cup victory. 👏🔥

Hard luck, Ecuador. 🇪🇨 You fought bravely and were unfortunate not to find the net despite some excellent opportunities. Wishing both teams the very best for the rest of the tournament.

A big thank you to FIFA and all the organizers for delivering a fantastic World Cup experience. The matches have been thrilling, well-organized, and enjoyable to watch. Looking forward to many more memorable moments in FIFA World Cup 2026! 🌎🏆✨
